examples: Its oscillation depends on the strength of the gravitational field.
Encompassed in a luminous cloud, of which he was now merely the fiery heart, he swung through unthinkable arcs of oscillation, like a vast pendulum.
Some oscillation of the fuselage had been noticed on early flights.
To explore this they used an index of weather severity called the North Atlantic oscillation.
Variable airflow and oscillation is controlled either by remote or on the front of the machine.
